meta.purpose: Novelty-reserve stimulus set. Three streams are each read line by line; at every cursor the measure (scripts/novelty-reserve.mjs) emits, over PRIOR CONTEXT ONLY (causally), the surprise channels and the reserve amplitudes the engine holds. There are NO annotations here on purpose — which stream is which, where the newcomer cursor is, and the predicted ordering are held in a separate key applied only at scoring time (data/novelty-reserve-key.json). Do not infer or guess.
meta.pressure: Inside-out constant hunt (the campaign's named exemplar): the hand-rolled NOVELTY_RESERVE = 1.0 in src/core/surprise.js. The reserved amplitude the reader holds for an as-yet-unseen atom is a fixed constant, so the reserve SHARE the Born step derives, NOVELTY/(total+NOVELTY), is a function of total mass alone — blind to whether newcomers have been ARRIVING. Concrete cast supplied by a random Wikipedia draw (structured draw around a seed); the structural pressure is fixed by the constant hunt.

seed_of_record.roster_draw: https://en.wikipedia.org/w/api.php?action=query&list=random&rnnamespace=0&rnlimit=18 (rncontinue 0.371316968208|0.371318096934|320819|0) — Enrico Saraceni #32672255, Dmitri Sychev #489970, Mailin Vargas #18901956, Henning Wallgren #32156159, Ron Butler #20523561, Jannie Borst #61665822

summary_draws.title: When the Party Ends
summary_draws.supplied: Bimini, Redshank, Harvey Kirkby, Billie Blonde

meta.design: Each stream is 20 lines; the last line (cursor 19) is the SAME newcomer, 'Stevenson arrived.', a name absent from every stream before the cursor. Every line deposits exactly one figure mention, so total γ-mass at the cursor is matched across streams by construction — which forces the CURRENT reserve, 1/(total+1), to read all three identically. The streams differ only in WHEN newcomers arrive. stream_b and stream_c are count-matched (identical distinct-name count, intro count, recurrence count, total mass): they differ ONLY in the temporal order of the same events, so every count-based surface feature is equal and only a recency-weighted reserve can tell them apart.
